programme.title: Water Matters Ep101 - Freshwater
programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep507: Paddling The Galapagos Islands
programme.desc: Facing Waves travels to Ecuador to explore the Galapagos Islands - one of the world's most spectacular and biodiverse regions.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep209: Queensland, Australia
programme.desc: Next Stop visits Queensland, Australia and explores The Great Barrier Reef, Cairns Tropical Zoo, the Daintree Discovery Centre and Tjapukai Aboriginal Cultural Park.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep112: Deep White - Why Sharks Attack
programme.desc: Deep White explores ways to research sharks to determine why sharks attack and to study innovative ways to train sharks in order to prevent future attacks. Sharks are surprisingly intelligent and able to perform complex tasks. Sharks can distinguish different signals and cues in feeding routines and they develop strong bonds with their trainers.

programme.title: Xplash Ep110
programme.desc: Xplash brings you amazing action in, on, and near water. In this episode, we travel to the Bahamas and witness a world freediving record, fish for crocodiles with coconuts on a rope, and start the show off by checking out a new evolution in human flight.

programme.title: The Great Barrier Reef: World's most amazing coral reef
programme.desc: This expedition to the Great Barrier Reef is designed to study the health and resilience of one of the world’s most amazing coral reefs. The expedition’s goal is to collect data about the world's most remote reefs and build a picture of how reefs are faring in today's changing climate.

programme.title: Sports Adventure Ep503: The Wellerbrucke Rapids… A Kayaker’s Dream
programme.desc: The Wellerbrucke rapid is a world class kayaker’s dream. Not only offering up great freestyle adventures, it also hosts the Adidas Sick-line Extreme Kayak Championships. This competition is seen through the eyes of 3-time champion Sam Sutton.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep110: The Ship Sinkers
programme.desc: Mothballed, de-commissioned naval vessels are toxic time-bombs, filled with PCB’s, asbestos, lead paint, oil and grease. Hundreds rust in dockyards around the world. What can be done with them? A team of Canadians has developed an innovative solution…they clean the ships...then sink them!

programme.title: Sportsman's Adventures: Kings of Texas
programme.desc: Captain Rick Murphy is on the troll for kingfish in Port Mansfield, Texas. Guiding him to the fish is Captain Chad Kinney from Texas Insider Fishing Report.

programme.title: Ride Snowboards Presents: Rough Around The Edges
programme.desc: Rough Around The Edges dives into 30 years of Ride Snowboards. Pow days, lawsuits, trespassing, wild decisions, and relentless innovation. A raw, honest look at the brand that shaped modern riding.

programme.title: Assisted Living
programme.desc: After watching Spencer Schubert’s part in the Torment snowboarding film, “Good Sport,” Mikey Leblanc found himself inspired to get back on the toboggan. One phone call later and the newly formed duo got to work filming "ASSISTED LIVING.” This short-film will have you icing your knees in no time.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Brighton Resort - Episode 01
programme.desc: In our latest MICRODOSE series we aim to explore the most influential resorts and iconic locations in snowboarding history, starting with—that’s right—Brighton Resort in Salt Lake City, Utah. Welcome to Brighton Resort Episode 1 of 5. For many riders young and old, Brighton Resort will forever be the epicenter of the snowboarding world. The plentiful snowfall, terrain parks, lift ops, cat drivers, mechanics, management, cafeteria, cooks, and mountain culture are all first class. Back in the early days, very few ski resorts were willing to take a chance on the newfound “lifestyle sport” of snowboarding, but Brighton took the leap. In doing so, Brighton made all the difference. Within a few years, hundreds of ski areas around the world came to see Brighton’s approach to snowboarding as the gold standard. From the biggest vacation destinations to the smallest trash heaps covered in fake snow, everyone (whether they’ve known it or not) has borrowed from the Brighton playbook. This has made it possible for millions of would-be snowboarders to make their first turns safely in-bounds via rope-tows, chairlifts, and gondola rides. Newbies need not traipse into the backcountry with no snow sense and little skill. For this we have Brighton to thank.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Neverland
programme.desc: Neverland is a state of mind, a mountain pushed up from the ground by imagination. Anyone can go but most people have trouble with the simple directions: Follow your dreams.

programme.title: Sparks
programme.desc: Take a pow trip around the world and into the mind of Wolle Nyvelt to find out why his passion for snowboarding runs so deep. From his legendary tenure as a rider to his work shaping pow surfers with Asmo, Wolle has dedicated his life to the culture of sliding sideways. "Sparks is the exploration into what makes snowboarding so fun and exciting to us all. It’s an interpretation of our lifestyle; the culture of building boards, riding mountains, and the adventure of choosing this path.” - Wolle Nyvelt

programme.title: Äsmosphere
programme.desc: Äsmosphere is the surf-influenced creation of Wolfgang Nyvelt showcasing his craftsmanship and appreciation for the glide and the turns we take on snow. After 16 years of filming legendary video parts, freeriding is now at the forefront of Wolle’s mind.

programme.title: Inaka
programme.desc: ‘Inaka’ is a short film about Iwanai, ‘the hidden beauty’ of Hokkaido. Snowboarders Wolfgang Nyvelt, Garrett Warnick and Bode Merrill drop everything and head to the North Island of Japan in search of good times and backcountry powder. Filmed by Billabong ambassador and filmmaker Chris Burkard.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Optimistic?
programme.desc: For those who live to snowboard, climate change can present an impossible challenge or become a catalyst for creativity. It all depends on how you look at it. In the movie Optimistic?, Absinthe Films follows 15 riders as they each explore the effects of global warming. Timely. Innovative. Positive.

programme.title: Hillside Project - Prototyping in Mayrhofen
programme.desc: This past year, Louif Paradis and Harrison Gordon visited Wolle’s hometown of Mayrhofen to better understand the complex prototyping process and to see where Wolle carved his teeth as a snowboarder and a shaper. Filmed by David Vladyka Riding: Wolle Nyvelt Harrison Gordon Louif Paradis Victor Daviet

programme.title: Hillside Project - Rizumu
programme.desc: An intergenerational exploration of Japan in search of rhythm, flow, and incredibly deep snow. Each year Wolle Nyvelt and a select crew of snowboarders set out to explore new terrain and test different shapes within the Hillside Project Series. After being closed to travel for the last couple of years, Japan was the obvious choice. Needless to say, the crew composed of Wolle, Takaharu Nakai, Louif Paradis and Luke Lund scored. Featuring: Wolle Nyvelt, Takaharu Nakai, Louif Paradis, Luke Lund Filmed by David Vladyka

programme.title: Hillside Project - Äsmo Factory
programme.desc: Making boards at the Äsmo factory! Featuring Josh Dirksen, Max Buri and Wolfgang Nyvelt

programme.title: Tomorrow Will Be Better
programme.desc: Czech freestyle motocross star Libor Podmol is proof that the wildest dreams come true. In January, 2010 he flies to the US, buys a Suzuki 250 two-stroke, becomes 6 times world champ and signs a sponsorship deal with Rockstar Energy.

programme.title: California Republic
programme.desc: No other place offers such endless freedom while fueling surfing's evolution. California's blue skies, green waters, and landscapes inspire millions worldwide and shape global culture.

programme.title: Peace and Left II
programme.desc: A Basque freesurfer documents a five-month journey through Indonesia, traveling with family, friends, and alone, capturing his surf adventure on camera.

programme.title: All Or Nothing
programme.desc: A self-supported project celebrating two-wheel sports, filmed across Europe, featuring young talents and world-class riders in MTB, trials, BMX, and motorsports.

programme.title: Because
programme.desc: A high-end freeski documentary following 22 professional athletes across record snowfall winters, facing deep powder, massive cliffs, and extreme expeditions, while sharing their ambition, discipline, and drive to reach the next level of their careers.

programme.title: Journey To Giglio
programme.desc: On January of 2012 the Italian cruise ship Costa Concordia sank in shallow waters after striking an underwater rock off Isola del Giglio. Many things remained unclear about this tragedy, so Andi van Zyl is set to discover the truth regarding this incident.Journey to Giglio is an investigative piece on the infamous Costa Concordia tragedy. Andi van Zyl is on the Italian island of Giglio for an exclusive exposé on the shipwreck that shocked the world. She will leave no rock unturned as she digs into what happened the night of the accident and uncovers the disaster’s impact on the local residents and economy.Highlights include exploration of the island and disaster site, and an interview with the man at the helm of the salvage operation, Nick Sloane. Andi sits down with the fellow South African to discuss the delicate process of freeing the wrecked cruise-liner from the reef without spoiling the pristine waters of Giglio Island.Find out the mystery behind the sinking of Costa Concordia on this Journey to Giglio.

programme.title: Eurosaf Championship Tavira
programme.desc: The EUROSAF (European Sailing Federation) Championship will take place in the waters off the Portuguese town of Tavira. The 19 sailing champions of Europe will be crowned in this gathering that has over 150 sailors and more than 100 boats and boards compete against triumph. 14 European countries have sent their best sailors to compete in eight different disciplines, including single-handed and double-handed dinghies, plus sailboards and high performance dinghy. They will compete over the 5-day competition to choose the youth champion of Europe in each of these disciplines. Follow the competition of the future talent of the sailing world as they sail across the waters of Tavira, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Surfer's Blood
programme.desc: Renowned surf photographer and filmmaker Patrick Trefz explores the essence of the sport he loves by profiling those who inspire him. Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1977, the Cannes Yachting Festival takes place every September in elegant, luxurious surroundings in the sparkling bay of Cannes. Jump on board the 2018 Cannes Yachting Festival to discover superyachts, equipment, regattas, competitions and more.

programme.title: Hempel World Cup Series - Medemblik
programme.desc: The Hempel Sailing World Cup Series is back. The 2021 season takes place in Medemblik, The Netherlands, during the famous Allianz Regatta. This is the first Hempel Cup Series since the outbreak of the COVID-19 virus, and sailors are excited.A grand total of 350 sailors from 47 different countries are participating across eight Olympic classes. Watch the best moments of the competition at The Netherlands.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 6
programme.desc: For its sixth season, the ultra-high performance one design catamarans, once again visited five top venues across the world. Each location selected particularly for its ideal weather conditions - stable winds and flat waters - perfect for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at speeds of over 30 knots. Earlier in 2019, intensive discussions and decisions took place within the teams with many deciding to focus their efforts for the upcoming season, on the GC32 Racing Tour. This season the tour welcomed some new teams as well as many familiar regular GC32 crews. In total 12 teams from 9 different counties came together to take part in the 6th GC32 Racing Tour. Amongst them, some of the most well-known professional sailors in the world.

programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: American Terror Story
programme.desc: This is supernatural horror in the vein of "The Grudge" and "The Ring". The ghost of a young asian girl who committed suicide a century ago is awakened by a group of college students, who fall victim to their own suicides under her spell.

programme.title: Armenian Haunting
programme.desc: An Armenian-American journalist turns into an unwilling ghost hunter while researching the sudden deaths in her family and their connection to a paranormal mystery.

programme.title: Reel Nightmare: Book of Nightmare
programme.desc: Three beautiful, vengeful witches awakened by an ancient book, the Necronomicon, bring production of a film in their old family home to a deadly halt.

programme.title: Sadomaster
programme.desc: Extreme urban violence reigns in Argentina. Senator Beccar Varela rises as the only way to stop violence with his "zero tolerance" politic. People doesn't suspect that Beccar is the head of the nazi gang that causes the violence. When members of the gang torture and rape a retarded man, a mysterious Masked avenger begins his brutal revenge against the gangs and the corrupt politics.

programme.title: Domestic Hell
programme.desc: Jack and Julia are a couple with dark secrets. Blanca is a tortured soul with a past. And Olivia is hellbent on finding the truth. When these four lives intersect, nobody escapes. Bonds are tested; wills are broken; and, metal is forged. It's a tale of survival, trust, and darkness from the creators of Bloody Drama.

programme.title: Talk to Me

programme.title: Youth Topia

programme.title: Adam Ondra: Pushing the Limits

programme.title: In die Welt - Into the World

programme.desc: At the Julie-Roger-Haus in Frankfurt am Main, a care facility for seniors of all sexual orientations, "grandpa is finally allowed to be gay" (FAZ).

programme.title: 1st Bite
programme.desc: Set on a tropical island in Thailand, the strange plight of a beleaguered chef who, while romancing a mysterious woman, discovers the diabolical Zen of cooking. Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: Campus Life Experience - Episode 5
programme.desc: So far in Campus Life Experience we have strengthened our knowledge on the connection and relationship between horse and rider. We get ready to work on this relationship by practicing with our equine friends and learning new facts and tips. However, participants are realizing their experience is almost over and emotions arise.

programme.title: CSI2* Maeza Grand Prix - Grand Prix
programme.desc: Welcome to the Yeguada Finca Maeza, the international host for this incredible competition. In Asturias and surrounded by the most characteristic landscape, it wraps in a captivating silence. For two weekends the Maeza family welcomes riders and horses from all over the world openly. Who has what it takes to win? Find out now the highlights of the competition at Maeza, on HorseTV.

programme.title: Copa Lazio
programme.desc: The Lazio Cup is a two-heat category on four courses of different heights: 115, 120, 125 and 140. With 17 teams at the start, it is an awaited event in the show jumping Italian agenda. Celebrated in "La Macchiarella" Equestrian Village, covering an area of 9 hectares, we can see riders, horses, ponies and spectators assemble to watch this exciting competition. Enjoy the best moments of the 2021 Lazio Cup!

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 8 - Stockholm
programme.desc: The Swedish capital of Stockholm is the host of the eighth leg of the Longines Global Champions Tour 2022: the international circuit that challenges top-riders from around the world in individual show jumping. As one of the hardest jump offs this season, who will make it to the top in Sweden? Watch the highlights of the Longines Global Champions Tour Stockholm Grand Prix!

programme.title: Jumping International Bordeaux - Grand Prix Land Rover
programme.desc: The CSI5*W Grand Prix Land Rover Trophée is one of the most awaited competitions in the Jumping International de Bordeaux. With a height of 1.60m, it is one of the toughest tests in the French event. Riders will have to show their perseverance, effort and speed in the obstacle course in order to get a spot in the podium.Relieve the best moments of the Grand Prix Land Rover 2019 edition.

programme.title: The Flying Deuces
programme.desc: Ollie has fallen in love with the innkeeper's daughter in Paris. The only problem - she's very much in love with her husband. To forget her he joins the Foreign Legion with Stan

programme.title: Keep It In Context
programme.desc: When you feel surrounded by pressure and fear, it’s easy to lose perspective. But what if God’s already provided the help you’ve been praying for? Keep it in context: the battle isn’t proof you’re losing, it’s evidence that you’re carrying something worth fighting for.

programme.title: Your Label Is Lying
programme.desc: This sermon is for someone who has been hearing the same lies from the enemy for so long that you’ve started to believe them. But you are not your issue. You are not your bad decision. It’s time to interrupt your story with truth and leave the lies behind, because the Word says otherwise.

programme.title: The War Of Whispers
programme.desc: Ever feel like there are too many voices telling you what to do and who to be? The enemy whispers fear, doubt, and distraction, but God’s whisper brings peace, purpose, and direction. When you stop agreeing with the enemy’s lies and start trusting the whisper of the One who sent you, you’ll find confidence in where — and who — you are.

programme.title: This Is Then
programme.desc: Some things look “stupid” to the world… until God uses them to change everything. If you’ve been holding back because you need everything to make sense, this will call you to trust what God promised and practice gratitude in the hard place.

programme.title: God Prompts
programme.desc: We often ask God to do what we want, but faith starts with doing what He says. When you trust God as your good Father and follow His prompting, even small steps can unlock something big.

programme.title: A Steady Hand For A Sudden Blessing
programme.desc: In “A Steady Hand For A Sudden Blessing,” Pastor Steven Furtick teaches us that even when we don’t see God moving, His hand still holds us steadily.

programme.title: The Juniors y La Formula Imperial
programme.desc: Narra las vidas de 7 adolescentes millonarios que se aventuran a planificar una revolución social, generada por vídeo-escándalos y experimentos médicos, con el objetivo de generar un cambio en la ideología mundial, el conflicto entre las clases sociales y el enfrentamiento con sus muchachas de servicio doméstico.

programme.title: Mi Pequeña Pesadilla
programme.desc: Después de la terrible experiencia y la pérdida de sus amigos, Heather se ve obligada a regresar al Hotel Fear donde Travis se prepara para sus próximas víctimas.

programme.title: Cartero
programme.desc: Hernán Sosa es un joven tímido que viene del interior a la ciudad. En su pueblo siempre estuvo enamorado de una chica inalcanzable, Yanina. Hernán consigue trabajo en el correo. Durante el reparto, Hernán descubre que Yanina se encuentra en la ciudad, en la zona de su reparto. En consecuencia, comienza a desplegar sus nuevos conocimientos de cartero para llegar hasta ella. Pero a medida que se acerca, descubre que unos viejos carteros están organizando un robo en el mismo edificio donde trabaja Yanina. Envalentonado por la fuerza del amor, Hernán se enfrentará a los peligros que rodean a Yanina para llegar a declararle lo que siente.

programme.title: [object Object]
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Vidas Violentas
programme.desc: integrada por seis cortometrajes escritos y dirigidos por seis de los más connotados directores mexicanos, la película fue realizada y dirigida para concientizar y reducir la violencia de género, el acoso escolar en las escuelas y la violencia doméstica. Proviene de una iniciativa del gobierno en el marco de la campaña basta no violencia

programme.title: Despertar El Polvo
programme.desc: Es la historia de un hombre que ha sufrido las desgracias de vivir una vida trasgredida por la delincuencia y corrupción, el barrio de Iztapalapa es el escenario donde vaga por las calles, invisible, ignorado y solitario, sumido en su miseria. Un evento desafortunado mueve el instinto protector de Chano que intenta regresar al mundo del crimen para lograr sacar a su ahijado de la cárcel.

programme.title: De La Piel del Diablo
programme.desc: La atracción se desata entre un hombre y una mujer que se conocen en una galería de arte. Comparten gustos y aficiones, y ambos parecen ser justo lo que el otro necesita… pero lo que debería haber sido una noche de pasión, pronto se convertirá en un juego perverso, lleno de trampas y mentiras, en el que nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.
